step_rationale: Cardiac contractile protein released upon myocardial necrosis; primary biomarker for AMI diagnosis and risk stratification.
mechanism: Cardiac troponin I is released from damaged cardiomyocytes following myocardial ischemia and necrosis and is the gold-standard biomarker for acute MI diagnosis, prognosis, and risk stratification.
